criteria.criterion: All screens defined in the screen-spec.json are implemented as Next.js pages with matching routes
Every page with async data fetching has an error boundary implemented using error.tsx
Mobile-first responsive design is applied — base styles target mobile, md: and lg: prefixes for larger screens
No 'use client' directive appears in layout.tsx or root page.tsx (server components by default)
No NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefixed environment variable contains sensitive data (API keys, secrets)
All components in the PRD component inventory have corresponding .tsx files in src/components/
